description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three manual test jobs named smoketest_debian, smoketest_rhel, and smoketest_ubuntu, each in the test stage. Use the debian:$DEB_MAJOR_VERSION image for the Debian job, rockylinux:$RH_MAJOR_VERSION for the RHEL job, and ubuntu:$UBU_MAJOR_VERSION for the Ubuntu job, and configure parallel matrix builds: DEB_MAJOR_VERSION (bullseye, bookworm) with PG_MAJOR_VERSION 13‑18; RH_MAJOR_VERSION (8,9) with PG_MAJOR_VERSION 13‑18; UBU_MAJOR_VERSION (jammy, noble) with PG_MAJOR_VERSION 13‑18. In each job run the listed script commands: for Debian/Ubuntu run apt-get update; apt-get install -y postgresql-common gnupg; /usr/share/postgresql-common/pgdg/apt.postgresql.org.sh -y; apt-get install -y curl lsb-release; echo deb http://apt.dalibo.org/labs $(lsb_release -cs)-dalibo main > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/dalibo-labs.list; curl -fsSL -o /etc/apt/trusted.gpg.d/dalibo-labs.gpg https://apt.dalibo.org/labs/debian-dalibo.gpg; apt-get update; apt-get install -y postgresql-$PG_MAJOR_VERSION postgresql_anonymizer_$PG_MAJOR_VERSION; mkdir -p $PGDATA; chown $PGUSER $PGDATA; su $PGUSER -c "/usr/lib/postgresql/$PG_MAJOR_VERSION/bin/initdb $PGDATA"; su $PGUSER -c "/usr/lib/postgresql/$PG_MAJOR_VERSION/bin/pg_ctl start"; createdb $PGDATABASE; psql -c "ALTER SYSTEM SET session_preload_libraries = 'anon'"; psql -c "SELECT pg_reload_conf();"; psql -c "CREATE EXTENSION anon;"; psql -c "SELECT anon.version();". For the RHEL job run dnf install -y https://download.postgresql.org/pub/repos/yum/reporpms/EL-$RH_MAJOR_VERSION-x86_64/pgdg-redhat-repo-latest.noarch.rpm; dnf -qy module disable postgresql; dnf install -y postgresql$PG_MAJOR_VERSION-server postgresql$PG_MAJOR_VERSION-contrib; dnf install -y https://yum.dalibo.org/labs/dalibo-labs-4-1.noarch.rpm; dnf install -y postgresql_anonymizer_$PG_MAJOR_VERSION; then mkdir -p $PGDATA; chown $PGUSER $PGDATA; su $PGUSER -c /usr/pgsql-$PG_MAJOR_VERSION/bin/initdb $PGDATA; su $PGUSER -c "/usr/pgsql-$PG_MAJOR_VERSION/bin/pg_ctl start"; createdb $PGDATABASE; psql -c "ALTER SYSTEM SET session_preload_libraries = 'anon'"; psql -c "SELECT pg_reload_conf();"; psql -c "CREATE EXTENSION anon;"; psql -c "SELECT anon.version();". All jobs use variables DEBIAN_FRONTEND, PGDATA, PGDATABASE, PGPASSWORD, PGUSER, PSQL and have no caches, artifacts, or services.
